## Drying aid & topper
Q²M QuickDetailer is the answer to the needs of detailing enthusiasts searching for the most versatile daily quick-detailing product. It enhances gloss and adds great slickness while removing spots, streaks, or fingerprints. It's completely safe to use on coatings as well as on traditional waxes.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-quick-detailer_145f697b-8199-49ff-8e8a-9be9e988e661.jpg?v=1702339008&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-quick-detailer1.jpg?v=1702339008&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-quick-detailer-banner.jpg?v=1702339008&width=2400)

Removes water spots, streaks, and fingerprints.
When used as a drying aid on a wet vehicle, Quick Detailer adds another layer of lubricity and prevents scratching while drying. It also helps catch any water spots from forming.
A great product to bring to any car show, it can be used to remove light dust, bug guts, and bird droppings without scratching the paint while adding another layer of gloss.
For caked-on wax, use the Quick Detailer to soften and remove it.

A must in any glovebox
Quick, easy, and effortless gloss enhancement on all painted surfaces of your vehicle. Simply spray on and wipe off. Q²M QuickDetailer will remove streaks and spots, leaving a glossy and slick finish. It’s by far the easiest way to boost the look of your car in almost no time. 
**Did you know: **GYEON Quick Detailer was tested by the Forensic Detailing channel and demonstrated one of the highest gloss levels measured by a gloss meter.
**Scroll down for detailer reviews and FAQs.**

Description

# 

## GYEON Quick Detailer 400ml

### Superb maintenance products for outstanding detailing performance

[![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/download-gyeon-brochure_480x480.jpg?v=1666391207)](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/GYEON__02_Leaflet_DetailingWash_Maintenance_2021_WEB.pdf?v=1666391021)

Q²M QuickDetailer is the answer to the needs of detailing enthusiasts searching for the most versatile daily quick detailing product. It enhances gloss and adds great slickness while removing spots, streaks or fingerprints. It’s completely safe to use on coatings as well as on traditional waxes.

AVAILABLE CAPACITIES: 400 ML / 1000 ML

### BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Quick, easy and effortless gloss enhancement on all painted surfaces of your vehicle. Simply spray on and wipe off. Q²M QuickDetailer will remove streaks&spots and leave a glossy and slick finish. It’s by far the easiest way to boost the look of your car in almost no-time. TIP: Use Q²M QuickDetailer as a drying aid on a wet car. The process will become easier, the finish better and instant gloss will remain for weeks.

CONSUMPTION: 40-50ml/car

GLOSS:     ★★★★★

### EASY TO USE

Q²M QuickDetailer is the easiest product of its kind, making it a child’s play to wipe of even when it dries out on the surface. It may be used both on dry and wet paint as it unfolds its potential as a drying aid. The product is a glass on its own when it comes to the slickness of the surface. Its versatile character allows the use on all exterior surfaces.

What's the different between GYEON's Ceramic Detailer and Quick Detailer?

The solution of Quick Detailer is slipperier and can be used to remove light contaminants like bird droppings on the go without scratching the paint. It can also be used as clay lube. 
Ceramic Detailer is more durable but should only be used when the paint is clean. Both products can be used on PPF, plastics, windows, wheels, chrome, trims, etc.

Is it streaky?

Not at all, Quick Detailer wipes off very easily. It can even be applied under the sun; you just need to work quickly.

How long does it last?

4 to 6 weeks. Quick Detailer is not meant to be used as a standalone product but rather as a topper, gloss booster and maintainer for existing waxes, sealants, and coatings.

Does it fill tiny scratches and swirls?

No, it does not. If you prefer something that fills ever so slightly, use GYEON Cure. Cure fills and adds a shade to the paint, giving it a really good appearance.
